steps.title: Use the formula for mean of combined data
steps.content:
The mean of data set C is:
$$\text{Mean of C} = \frac{\text{Sum of A + Sum of B}}{125}$$
To find the sums, use Sum = Mean × Count:
  • Data set A: $75 \times 25 = 1875$ meters
  • Data set B: $50 \times 65 = 3250$ meters
  • Total sum: $1875 + 3250 = 5125$ meters
